svg.text: SAP-1 — ANNOTATED DRAWING REFERENCE (illustrative, NOT FOR FIELD USE)

svg.title: Plan view — Two-man fighting position
svg.desc: Two-man fighting position, excavated 4'-0" deep. The enemy is toward the front (top of the plan); FRONT and REAR are labeled. Features: earth-on-stringers overhead cover, revetted walls, grenade sumps, camouflage. Dimensions are illustrative placeholders — NOT FOR FIELD USE.

g.text: NOT FOR FIELD USE — illustrative placeholder data
